name: a little update!!
description:
haiii, i just wanted to tell you all that, honestly, right now i don't have many ideas, especially for tmnt, and, since i've already finished the requests, i'm seeing what ideas i have scrolling around there, also, tomorrow i'll finish the 3rd season of Invincible, AHHHHHGGGGG how i love sinister mark, and cecil (but, this is between you and me) most likely tomorrow night you'll see a sinister mark bot on my profile. Also, i wanted to tell you all that, if we reach 490 followers, i'll open my request form again, i also hope you like the little update i made to the form! I need things to be more organized (off topic, I follow a user who makes Invincible bots, and on one of their sinister mark bots, I jokingly said "this is crap, now make more of my babe 🙏🙏🙏" or something like that, and when I check, my comment is gone, I don't know if the user deleted it manually or if it was janitor ai's management, but I swear that is my sense of humor, now I feel a little sad about it 💔💔💔)

(i luv him so much)
creator: SimpOfPixels
